cpapdex_synthetic_golden.node-export.jso.note: ADDED 2026-06-28 (CPAPDEX-PHASE9-FOLLOWUPS-II §1) — the CPAPDex content/reference equivalence fixture. RETIRED 2026-07-12 (CPAP-REAL-CORPUS-2026-07-11-BRIEF §P2) — the claim that CPAPDex "can't join" the equivalence gate was FALSE. An input is just bytes: readEDF takes an ArrayBuffer, so a binary multi-file EDF set joins the gate exactly like a {text}/CSV. See fixture cpapdex_synthetic_edf_golden.node-export.json, which drives readEDF -> buildSessionFromEdf -> buildNight -> cpapBuildExport over five COMMITTED synthetic .edf files. Original note follows: CPAPDex can't join the Phase-9 'compute() ≡ committed export' equivalence gate (its real input is a BINARY multi-file EDF set, not a {text}/CSV), so the floor only asserted compute() ≡ cpapBuildExport — pinning the two CODE PATHS to each other, NOT to a reference OUTPUT (a regression inside the shared cpapBuildExport would drift both paths together and stay green). This golden closes that: the Dex-Test-Suite 'equivalence gate' group rebuilds the DETERMINISTIC synthetic night CpapDsp._synthEdfSet({oxi:true,cs:true}) -> buildSessionFromEdf -> buildNight -> CpapFusion.cpapBuildExport and deep-diffs the FULL export tree against this committed reference (excludes file/provenance/kernel/generated). Synthetic + deterministic (no RNG; fixed t0Ms), fully regenerable: re-run that chain via the CPAPDex modules bundled @ manifestHash 75d4c6dee9b6 reproduces this byte-for-byte (provenance null on the headless path, volatile-excluded; crossNode deterministically null — no peers ingested). REGENERATE this golden whenever you intentionally change the export shape. Produced 2026-06-28 by the loose modules (same source as CPAPDex.html); NO re-bundle. GATE B asserts the producing bundle's CURRENT manifestHash still equals 75d4c6dee9b6.

cpapdex_synthetic_multinight_golden.node.note: ADDED 2026-06-28 (CPAPDEX-PHASE9-FOLLOWUPS-III §1) — the MULTI-NIGHT companion to cpapdex_synthetic_golden. Retiring cpapdex-multi17 (-I §1, not faithfully regenerable) left exportNight's multi-night branch (chrono.length>=3 -> a schema.multiNight envelope wrapping N per-night cpapBuildExport trees + a ganglior.crossnight aggregate header from CPAPCross.crossNightBlock) with NO fixture coverage; the single-night golden pins ONE cpapBuildExport tree and cpapdex-cross.js has its own unit coverage, but the WRAPPER that stitches N nights + the header was diffed against a reference nowhere. This golden closes that: the Dex-Test-Suite 'equivalence gate' group rebuilds >=3 DETERMINISTIC nights from CpapDsp._synthEdfSet({oxi:true,cs:true}), each shifted by a WHOLE day (Clock Contract: floating tMs; a whole-day shift keeps the wall-clock time-of-day but advances dateAnchorMs -> distinct nights so buildNight keeps them separate), reassembles the IDENTICAL envelope cpapdex-app.js exportNight() builds (kernel / schema.multiNight:true / generated / nightCount / crossNight:CPAPCross.crossNightBlock(chrono) / nights:chrono.map(cpapBuildExport)), and deep-diffs the FULL tree against this committed reference (excludes file/provenance/kernel/generated; crossNight.schema.generated is the crossnight envelope's own per-run stamp, stripped by the same `generated` key). Synthetic + deterministic (no RNG; fixed t0Ms day-shifted by 86400000 each -> startEpochMs 1781303310000/1781389710000/1781476110000; nights identical-per-metric so crossNight trends are 'stable', sd 0; headline []; crossNode deterministically null — no peers ingested). Fully regenerable: re-running that chain via the CPAPDex modules bundled @ manifestHash 75d4c6dee9b6 reproduces it byte-for-byte (provenance null on the headless path, volatile-excluded). exportNight INLINES the envelope (not a callable builder), so the test RECONSTRUCTS its shape — a SOURCE-PIN on cpapdex-app.js's exportNight reds if the wrapper shape drifts, forcing this golden + the reconstruction to be regenerated in lock-step. REGENERATE whenever you intentionally change the multi-night export shape. TEST/FIXTURE-ONLY — NO re-bundle (BUILD-MANIFEST + every bundle's manifestHash/buildHash unchanged). GATE B asserts the producing bundle's CURRENT manifestHash still equals 75d4c6dee9b6 — turns red the moment CPAPDex code changes.

Verified byte-identical against the live CpapFusion.cpapBuildMultiNightExport rebuild by the Dex-Test-Suite 'CPAPDex multi-night golden' diff gate (vol excluded). GATE B asserts the producing bundle's CURRENT manifestHash still equals b4f063b3da7c.

cpapdex_synthetic_edf_golden.node-export.note: ADDED 2026-07-12 (CPAP-REAL-CORPUS-2026-07-11-BRIEF P2) — the BINARY multi-file EDF equivalence leg, and the FIRST fixture whose INPUT bytes are themselves committed and content-addressed. Every other equiv input is a real recording (gitignored, absent in CI), so every other compute()-equivalence diff SKIPS in CI; this one RUNS. Inputs are SYNTHETIC (tools/make-synthetic-edf.mjs): closed-form waveforms calibrated to a real corpus DISTRIBUTIONS, containing no recording of any person and no device identifier (EDF+ header identity fields blank) — which is exactly why they can ship in a public repo when the real EDFs cannot (their header carries a device serial; brief F3). Deterministic: re-running the generator reproduces the five .edf files byte-for-byte, so inputHashes are stable. Drives the FULL chain the _synthEdfSet golden skips: readEDF (binary parser + EDF+ TAL annotations) -> buildSessionFromEdf -> buildNight -> cpapBuildExport. Also the first gated input to exercise the SA2 oximetry lane (selfGateDesat/detectDesats/oximetryLane) — the real corpus reports oximeter-not-connected on 217/222 sessions, so that lane had never run on any gated input (brief F6). REGENERATE both the inputs (node tools/make-synthetic-edf.mjs) and this golden whenever the export shape changes.
